description: JOP is good tool to monitor time bound actions, it gives clarity on your quarterly deliverables and can be tracked at ant time.

cons: Unable to replicate OKR of previous Quarter, always we have to add OKR for new quarter. Some copy / forward OKR option shall be there.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
